messages.content: # Is your camera shaking for no reason? Follow this guide!

## Step 1
> Open Content Manager and navigate to `Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Graphics Adjusments > Origin Shift` and tick `active`

## Step 2
> Navigate to `Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > General Patch Settings > Track Camera Options` and tick `Disable camera wobble.`

## Step 3
> Navigate to `Settings > Assetto Corsa > View & UI > Camera` and untick `Lock onboard camera to horizon.`
